scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @segenerator/api & npm run dev --workspace @segenerator/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @segenerator/api && npm run build --workspace @segenerator/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @segenerator/api && npm run lint --workspace @segenerator/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @segenerator/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @segenerator/web
